notifications.title: Leave request approved
notifications.message: Your casual leave for Jun 28–29, 2026 has been approved by Alex Mercer.
notifications.body:
Hi Shivam,

Your casual leave request for Jun 28–29, 2026 has been approved. Please ensure your tasks are handed over before you go on leave.

Regards,
Alex Mercer
Engineering Manager

notifications.title: Extra working day detected
notifications.message: A login was recorded on Apr 4, 2026 (Saturday). Review and submit a note if needed.
notifications.body: Our attendance system detected a clock-in on Saturday, Apr 4, 2026 at 10:15 AM. If you worked on this day, please submit an extra working day request with a note explaining the reason.

notifications.title: Incomplete attendance log
notifications.message: Jun 24, 2026 — clock-out missing. Please regularize your attendance.
notifications.body: Your attendance for Jun 24, 2026 shows a clock-in at 9:12 AM but no clock-out was recorded. Please regularize this entry before the monthly cutoff.

notifications.title: Quarterly leave cap reminder
notifications.message: You have used 2.5 of 6 paid leaves in Q2. Plan remaining days accordingly.
notifications.body: This is a friendly reminder that you have consumed 2.5 paid leave days in Q2 (May–Aug 2026). The quarterly cap is 6 days — any excess will be converted to unpaid leave automatically.

notifications.title: Pending approval required
notifications.message: Priya Sharma submitted a medical leave request awaiting your review.
notifications.body: Priya Sharma has requested medical leave from Jul 1–3, 2026. As her reporting manager, please review and approve or reject this request at your earliest convenience.

notifications.title: Holiday calendar updated
notifications.message: Independence Day (Aug 15) has been confirmed as a paid company holiday.
notifications.body: The 2026 holiday calendar has been updated. Independence Day on Saturday, Aug 15, 2026 is confirmed as a paid holiday. A long weekend bridge policy may apply — check with HR for details.

notifications.title: Daily worksheet reminder
notifications.message: You haven't submitted your daily worksheet for Jun 25, 2026.
notifications.body: Please log your tasks and hours for Jun 25, 2026 before end of day. Unsubmitted worksheets may affect project billing reports.

upcomingHolidays.name: Independence Day

upcomingHolidays.description: Company-wide holiday. Optional floating holiday can be swapped per policy.
